name: 25 Degrees
brand_guidelines: Bold, playful, indulgent. Focus on the sensory experience of premium burgers and shakes.
tone_of_voice: Fun, confident, slightly irreverent. Never corporate. Write like a food-obsessed friend.

content_rules.rule: Never reference investment returns or financial products
Never use the word 'cheap' — use 'value' or 'deal'
Always mention the dine-in experience, even in delivery content
Photography must show food in natural light, not studio flash
